---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: "blog/posts/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  page-size: 25
  feed:
    title: "CasCrab Lab Notes"
    items: 25
---

## Latest Posts

Welcome to the lab notes. I share updates, experiments, and observations from computational biology projects and AI-assisted research workflows.
